title: 2026-06-05-08 - First Boss TTK Boss-Only Harness
어떤_작업: Added npm run qa:boss-ttk and npm run qa:boss-ttk:dry.
진행_내용: npm run qa:boss-ttk at HP 3500: GO_BOSS_TTK_SAMPLE, 5/5 accepted samples, TTK median 21.92s, focused DPS median 159.7.
Use boss-only deterministic TTK as HP tuning input when Chrome/CDP cannot produce accepted TTK samples.
문제: The new harness removes browser/CDP instability, but it also removes movement, enemy clutter, boss attacks, and post-boss flow.
Browser qa:balance still has to prove first-boss reach/clear/death with HP 2800.
